purpose: Source and boundary register for clinician review and controlled handoff.

sources.title: FDA concerns with unapproved GLP-1 drugs used for weight loss
sources.use: Confirms retatrutide is not an FDA-approved drug and is not eligible for compounding under US federal law.

sources.title: Phase 3 retatrutide study in severe obesity and established cardiovascular disease
TRIUMPH-1 phase 3 topline results
sources.use: Sponsor-reported phase 3 results; not treated as regulatory approval.

sources.title: Retatrutide Clinician Export Baseline
sources.use: Predecessor export contract and safety boundary.

evidence_separation_rule: Regulatory status, trial registry records, sponsor topline reports and peer-reviewed evidence remain distinct evidence classes.
